title: Data quality and assumptions
text:
9 Raw vs transformed distribution check


Show code
sample_values <- function(dat, cols, label, max_points = 50000L) {
  vals <- as.numeric(as.matrix(dat[, cols, drop = FALSE]))
  vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
  if (length(vals) > max_points) {
    set.seed(123)
    vals <- sample(vals, max_points)
  }
  data.frame(scale = label, value = vals, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

dist_raw <- sample_values(raw_df, metabolite_cols, "raw")
dist_transformed <- sample_values(df, metabolite_cols, "log10+z")

dist_df <- bind_rows(dist_raw, dist_transformed)

dist_summary <- dist_df %>%
  group_by(scale) %>%
  summarise(
    n_values = n(),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    p01 = as.numeric(quantile(value, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)),
    median = as.numeric(quantile(value, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)),
    p99 = as.numeric(quantile(value, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

make_table(round_numeric(dist_summary, 3), caption = "Distribution summary before and after transformation")










Show code
plot_limits <- quantile(dist_df$value, probs = c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(
  dist_df %>% filter(value >= plot_limits[[1]], value <= plot_limits[[2]]),
  aes(x = value, color = scale, fill = scale)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution check: raw vs log10+z",
    x = "Value (trimmed to 1st-99th percentile)",
    y = "Density",
    color = "Scale",
    fill = "Scale"
  )

title: Clinical characteristics
text:
7 Dietary intake and diet quality
This table shows the descriptive summary of nutrient intakes and diet quality metrics across the two study visits (Visit 6 at 2 years of age and Visit 7 at 5–6 years of age) for the children included in the primary analyses. Continuous variables are represented as mean (SD); categorical diet quality is represented as n (%).


Show code
# 1. Summarise continuous
get_cont_summary <- function(df, vname) {
  val <- as.numeric(df[[vname]])
  val <- val[is.finite(val)]
  sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(val), sd(val))
}

vars_v6 <- c(
  "CEPercentProDiet6", "CEPercentCHODiet6", "CEPercentFatDiet6", "CEPercentSFADiet6",
  "CEPercentMUFADiet6", "CEPercentPUFADiet6", "CEPercentFAn3Diet6", "CEPercentFAn6Diet6",
  "CFibtotDiet6", "C_DietQuality_points_6"
)

vars_v7 <- c(
  "CEPercentProDiet7", "CEPercentCHODiet7", "CEPercentFatDiet7", "CEPercentSFADiet7",
  "CEPercentMUFADiet7", "CEPercentPUFADiet7", "CEPercentFAn3Diet7", "CEPercentFAn6Diet7",
  "CFibtotDiet7", "C_DietQuality_points_7"
)

row_labels <- c(
  "Protein (E%)", "Carbohydrate (E%)", "Total fat (E%)", "SFA (E%)",
  "MUFA (E%)", "PUFA (E%)", "n-3 fatty acids (E%)", "n-6 fatty acids (E%)",
  "Fiber (g)", "Diet quality score (points)"
)

cd6 <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(experiments(mae)[["visit_6"]]))
cd7 <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(experiments(mae)[["visit_7"]]))

cont_tbl_6 <- sapply(vars_v6, function(vn) get_cont_summary(cd6, vn))
cont_tbl_7 <- sapply(vars_v7, function(vn) get_cont_summary(cd7, vn))

cont_rows <- data.frame(
  `Dietary Factor` = row_labels,
  `2 Years (Visit 6)` = as.character(cont_tbl_6),
  `5-6 Years (Visit 7)` = as.character(cont_tbl_7),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 2. Summarise categorical
cat_summary <- function(df, vname) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(haven::as_factor(df[[vname]]))))
  total_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(x) & x != "")
  
  classes <- c("good", "moderate", "poor")
  res <- sapply(classes, function(cl) {
    if (cl == "good") {
      n <- sum(grepl("good", x))
    } else if (cl == "moderate") {
      n <- sum(grepl("moderate", x))
    } else {
      n <- sum(grepl("poor|needs to be vastly improved", x))
    }
    pct <- 100 * n / total_nonmiss
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", n, pct)
  })
  res
}

cat_v6 <- cat_summary(cd6, "C_DietQuality_classes_6")
cat_v7 <- cat_summary(cd7, "C_DietQuality_classes_7")

cat_rows <- data.frame(
  `Dietary Factor` = c("Diet quality category (n, %)", "  Good", "  Moderate", "  Poor"),
  `2 Years (Visit 6)` = c("", cat_v6[["good"]], cat_v6[["moderate"]], cat_v6[["poor"]]),
  `5-6 Years (Visit 7)` = c("", cat_v7[["good"]], cat_v7[["moderate"]], cat_v7[["poor"]]),
  check.names = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

diet_tbl <- rbind(cont_rows, cat_rows)
make_table(diet_tbl, caption = "Summary of dietary factors at baseline and follow-up visits")
